mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS name, PHONE AS phone, EMAIL AS email, BANK_CODE AS bankCode FROM FFG_BANK_CUSTOMER_DETAIL WHERE BANK_CODE = #{bankCode} AND USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT TX_ID AS txId, USER_ID AS userId, BANK_CODE AS bankCode, TX_CHANNEL AS txChannel, TX_TYPE AS txType, TX_AMOUNT AS txAmount, TO_CHAR(TX_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS txDatetime, TX_COUNTRY AS txCountry, TX_LOCATION AS txLocation, DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType, DEVICE_OS AS deviceOs, DEVICE_ID AS deviceId, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, FRAUD_SCORE AS fraudScore FROM FFG_TX_DATA WHERE BANK_CODE = #{bankCode} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND TX_ID = #{txId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TX_ID AS txId, USER_ID AS userId, BANK_CODE AS bankCode, TX_CHANNEL AS txChannel, TX_TYPE AS txType, TX_AMOUNT AS txAmount, TO_CHAR(TX_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS txDatetime, TX_COUNTRY AS txCountry, TX_LOCATION AS txLocation, DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType, DEVICE_OS AS deviceOs, DEVICE_ID AS deviceId, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, FRAUD_SCORE AS fraudScore FROM FFG_TX_DATA WHERE BANK_CODE = #{bankCode} AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TX_DATETIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
